zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Washburne於1590年5月10日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Robert Washburne40歲，母親Mary Heriot38歲。她於大約1607年與William Woodcock II在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 安東林 煙雨 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 武朋 瓦利布盧可享年98歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Washburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Washburne was born on 10 May 1590, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Robert Washburne, was 40 and her mother, Mary Heriot, was 38. She married William Woodcock II about 1607, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1688, in St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Washburne est née le 10 mai 1590, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Washburne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary Heriot, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé William Woodcock II environ 1607, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1688, à St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Washburne am 10. Mai 1590 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Washburne 40 und ihre Mutter Mary Heriot 38. Sie hat um 1607 in England William Woodcock II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1688 im Alter von 98 Jahren in St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Washburne(이)가 1590년 5월 10일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Washburne(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Heriot(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1607년 영국에서 William Woodcock II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Washburne nasceu em 10 de maio de 1590, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Washburne, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mary Heriot, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com William Woodcock II aproximadamente 1607, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1688, em St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 98 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.St Antholin, Budge Row, London, London,: ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Washburne родилась 10 мая 1590 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Washburne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Heriot, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Woodcock II около 1607 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1688 г. в местности ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Washburne nació el 10 de mayo de 1590, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Washburne, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mary Heriot, tenía 38 años. Se casó con William Woodcock II aproximadamente 1607, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1688, en St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra.
